title: Windjammer: The Voyage of the Christian Radich
original_title: Windjammer: The Voyage of the Christian Radich
overview: Windjammer, the first presentation in CINEMIRACLE, is the record of a training cruise of the full-rigged S/S Christian Radich from Oslo across the Atlantic, through the Caribbean, to New York and back home again.
